message:
fix(agentdb): remove sqlite3 to eliminate 10 HIGH severity vulnerabilities

Fixes #1091

- Remove sqlite3 and sqlite from optionalDependencies
- Migrate report-store.ts to use better-sqlite3
- Eliminates 73 packages from sqlite3 dependency chain
- Removes 10 HIGH severity vulnerabilities from tar@6.2.1
- Removes 8 deprecation warnings (glob, rimraf, npmlog, inflight, etc.)

better-sqlite3 uses prebuilt binaries instead of node-gyp compilation,
avoiding the vulnerable node-gyp dependency chain.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
